access.user: Can read semester information. Cannot modify semester data.
access.admin: Can read semester information. Does not directly modify semester facts through ordinary pages.
access.agent: Can only read existing semester information; no additional write permissions.

rules.organizational-dimension: Semesters are the organizational dimension for courses, sections, schedules, and exams.
rules.current-semester-by-rules: The current semester must be determined by explicit business rules, not by rough natural-year inference.
rules.semester-visible-in-filters: Semesters should be clearly visible in filters, group headings, detail basic info, and cross-semester browsing.

notes: REST pageSize accepts 1-100; the deprecated limit alias remains accepted and pageSize wins when both are supplied. Out-of-range values are rejected instead of clamped.

queries.name: semesters
notes: PageInput defaults to page=1 and pageSize=20; pageSize must remain within 1-100.

tools.name: list_semesters
notes: MCP limit accepts 1-100 and rejects out-of-range values instead of clamping.

rules.latest-startdate-wins: The current semester is determined by date range; when multiple semester ranges overlap the current date, the semester with the latest startDate is selected to prevent an older range or import residue from shadowing a more specific newer semester.

notes: Returns the current semester or 404 when none is found.
